name: Mask of Tumeken's resplendence
hoverSummary: Tier 95 magic power helm with 23.7 magic damage bonus.
detailLines: Requires level 95 Magic and 95 Defence to wear.
Tumeken's Resplendence activates after the armour pieces are worn for at least 5.4 seconds.
The set grants Sunshine crit bonuses and Asphyxiate upgrades at higher piece counts.
implementationNotes: Curated Tumeken helm from the live Mask of Tumeken's resplendence page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for tier, requirements, style bonus, and set bonus text.
